federation.note: Ontology-driven data-model codegen for the Solid app suite (design rev-3 P0). Deterministically compiles a sector ontology (OWL/RDFS) + SHACL profile + a per-domain codegen config into model.d.ts (types), model.json (a fidelity-asserted verified projection of shapes.ttl), model.js (a fixed-template shim over @jeswr/model-runtime), and a skolemized byte-reproducible shapes.ttl. Includes the L0 ontology-input adapter seam, the tier-a structural admission validator (labels+definitions, domain/range-or-waiver, SHACL coverage — fail-closed), and the build-time FIDELITY ASSERTION (the P0 exit criterion: model.json round-trips to shapes.ttl order-independently). Bookmarks pilot generates the @jeswr/solid-bookmark model and passes its existing test suite as the parity bar. GitHub-installable (committed dist/, ignore-scripts=true); npm publish deferred.
